case_title: AYLINE FINUCANE ET AL VS. MYND MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD IN MAIL SUBMITTED BY DEFENDANT
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS DENIED. (UNTIMELY)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,991.34 FILED BY FINUCANE, AYLINE FINUCANE, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2021 - CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE EVIDENCE TO DEFENDANT AND THE COURT TO JUL-20-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ZOOM APPEARANCE IS ALLOWED FOR ALL PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS AYLINE FINUCANE AND RYAN FINUCANE ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MYND MANAGMENT, INC REPRESENTED BY WHITLEY HEATON, PORTFOLIO MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR IS FILED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED WITH CASE FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TP APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINUCANE, RYAN
REMARK: EXHIBITS SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-15-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AYLINE AND RYAN FINUCANE ARE PRESENT. VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT, INC., REPRESENTED BY WHITLEY HEATON, PORTFOLIO MANAGER IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN OPEN COURT FOR $3,911.00. PROGRESS REPORT DATE IS SET FOR SEPTEMBER 15, 2021, AT 1:30 P.M. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE MET, AND PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES, THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO 9-15-21 AT 1:30 P.M. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED AS SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER DEFENDANT REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE / ZOOM (FOR HEARING SET FOR: JUNE 29, 2021) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FINUCANE, RYAN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WHITLEY HEATINF, PORTFOLIO MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED MAR-02-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-29-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AYLINE FINUCANE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RYAN FINUCANE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HIS WIFE AYLINE FINUCANE. DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT, INC. IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE REPRESENTED BY WHITLEY HEATON. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG ALLOWS THE DEFENDANT A CONTINUANCE TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM REQUEST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT MYND MANAGEMENT, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
ORDER RE CONTINUENCE ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO ALLOW FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE DOCUMENT TO DEFENDANT. ZOOM APPERARANCE IS ALLOWED FOR ALL PARTIES.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
